items.name: Ideal Gas Law
items.description: Common engineering forms of the ideal-gas law under one canonical family.
assumptions: Thermally and calorically ideal gas behavior.
Constant gas constant R in the operating range.

variants.name: Mass-Volume Form
variants.when_to_use: Use when total mass and control-volume size are primary knowns.

variants.name: Density Form
variants.when_to_use: Use when density-based flow/property calculations are primary.
